package rulecoverage

func PositiveDoubleCloseLocalChannel() string {
    ruleID := "double_close_local_channel"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "The same locally created channel appears to be closed more than once in one function body."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
